name: pocketbase
documentation: # PocketBase Python SDK [![Tests](https://github.com/vaphes/pocketbase/actions/workflows/tests.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/vaphes/pocketbase/actions/workflows/tests.yml) [![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/vaphes/pocketbase/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://coveralls.io/github/vaphes/pocketbase?branch=master) Python client SDK for the PocketBase backend. This is in early development, and at first is just a translation of the javascript lib using HTTPX. --- ## Installation Install PocketBase using PIP: ```shell python3 -m pip install pocketbase ``` ## Usage The rule of thumb here is just to use it as you would the javascript lib, but in a pythonic way of course! ```python from pocketbase import PocketBase # Client also works the same from pocketbase.client import FileUpload client = PocketBase('http://127.0.0.1:8090') # authenticate as regular user user_data = client.collection("users").auth_with_password( "user@example.com", "0123456789") # check if user token is valid user_data.is_valid # or as admin admin_data = client.admins.auth_with_password("test@example.com", "0123456789") # check if admin token is valid admin_data.is_valid # list and filter "example" collection records result = client.collection("example").get_list( 1, 20, {"filter": 'status = true && created > "2022-08-01 10:00:00"'}) # create record and upload file to image field result = client.collection("example").create( { "status": "true", "image": FileUpload(("image.png", open("image.png", "rb"))), }) # and much more... ``` > More detailed API docs and copy-paste examples could be found in the [API documentation for each service](https://pocketbase.io/docs/api-authentication). Just remember to 'pythonize it' 🙃. ## Development These are the requirements for local development: * Python 3.9+ * Poetry (https://python-poetry.org/) You can install locally: ```shell poetry install ``` Or can build and generate a package: ```shell poetry build ``` But if you are using only PIP, use this command: ```shell python3 -m pip install -e . ``` ## Tests To execute the tests use this command: ``` poetry run pytest ``` ## Sandbox integration testing A lot of real-world integration test against a sandboxed pocketbase instance will be included in the pytest when the sandbox is running (on 127.0.0.1:8090) to start the sandbox follow the following steps: ```bash export TMP_EMAIL_DIR=`mktemp -d` # Export temp dir used for sendmail sandbox bash ./tests/integration/pocketbase # Run the pocketbase sandbox (automatically downloads the latest pocketbase instance) pytest # Run test including sandbox API integration tests ``` ## License The PocketBase Python SDK is MIT licensed code.

classes.name: pocketbase.stores.base_auth_store.BaseAuthStore

methods.name: pocketbase.stores.base_auth_store.BaseAuthStore.token
documentation: Retrieves the stored token (if any).

methods.name: pocketbase.stores.base_auth_store.BaseAuthStore.model
documentation: Retrieves the stored model data (if any).

methods.name: pocketbase.stores.base_auth_store.BaseAuthStore.save
documentation: Saves the provided new token and model data in the auth store.

methods.name: pocketbase.stores.base_auth_store.BaseAuthStore.clear
documentation: Removes the stored token and model data form the auth store.

Base AuthStore class that is intended to be extended by all other
PocketBase AuthStore implementations.

methods.name: pocketbase.models.utils.base_model.BaseModel.load
documentation: Loads `data` into the current model.

methods.name: pocketbase.models.utils.base_model.BaseModel.is_new
documentation: Returns whether the current loaded data represent a stored db record.

classes.name: pocketbase.PocketBase
documentation:
Proxy class for `Client`

This is for cosmetic reasons only as you can use the
`Client` class just the same

methods.name: pocketbase.services.collection_service.CollectionService.import_collections
documentation:
Imports the provided collections.

If `delete_missing` is `True`, all local collections and schema fields,
that are not present in the imported configuration, WILL BE DELETED
(including their related records data)!

methods.name: pocketbase.client.Client.collection
documentation: Returns the RecordService associated to the specified collection.

methods.name: pocketbase.client.Client._send
documentation: Sends an api http request returning response object.

methods.name: pocketbase.client.Client.send_raw
documentation: Sends an api http request returning raw bytes response.

methods.name: pocketbase.client.Client.send
documentation: Sends an api http request.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.realtime_service.RealtimeService.subscribe
documentation: Inits the sse connection (if not already) and register the subscription.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.realtime_service.RealtimeService.unsubscribe_by_prefix
documentation:
Unsubscribe from all subscriptions starting with the provided prefix.

This method is no-op if there are no active subscriptions with the provided prefix.

The related sse connection will be autoclosed if after the
unsubscribe operation there are no active subscriptions left.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.realtime_service.RealtimeService.unsubscribe
documentation:
Unsubscribe from a subscription.

If the `subscriptions` argument is not set,
then the client will unsubscribe from all registered subscriptions.

The related sse connection will be autoclosed if after the
unsubscribe operations there are no active subscriptions left.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.log_service.LogService.get_list
documentation: Returns paginated logged requests list.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.log_service.LogService.get
documentation: Returns a single logged request by its id.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.log_service.LogService.get_stats
documentation: Returns request logs statistics.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.settings_service.SettingsService.get_all
documentation: Fetch all available app settings.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.settings_service.SettingsService.update
documentation: Bulk updates app settings.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.settings_service.SettingsService.test_s3
documentation: Performs a S3 storage connection test.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.settings_service.SettingsService.test_email
documentation:
Sends a test email.

The possible `email_template` values are:
- verification
- password-reset
- email-change

methods.name: pocketbase.services.utils.crud_service.CrudService.base_crud_path
documentation: Base path for the crud actions (without trailing slash, eg. '/admins').

methods.name: pocketbase.services.utils.crud_service.CrudService.get_first_list_item
documentation:
Returns the first found item by the specified filter.

Internally it calls `getList(1, 1, { filter })` and returns the
first found item.

For consistency with `getOne`, this method will throw a 404
ClientResponseError if no item was found.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.utils.crud_service.CrudService.get_one
documentation: Returns single item by its id.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.utils.base_crud_service.BaseCrudService.decode
documentation: Response data decoder

classes.name: pocketbase.services.utils.sse.Event
documentation: Representation of an event

methods.name: pocketbase.services.utils.sse.EventLoop._read
documentation: Read the incoming event source stream and yield event chunks

classes.name: pocketbase.services.utils.sse.SSEClient
documentation: Implementation of a server side event client

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.base_collection_path
documentation: Returns the current collection service base path.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.get_file_url
documentation: Builds and returns an absolute record file url.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.subscribe
documentation: Subscribe to realtime changes of any record from the collection.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.subscribeOne
documentation: Subscribe to the realtime changes of a single record in the collection.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.unsubscribe
documentation: Unsubscribe to the realtime changes of a single record in the collection.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.update
documentation:
If the current `client.auth_store.model` matches with the updated id, then
on success the `client.auth_store.model` will be updated with the result.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.delete
documentation:
If the current `client.auth_store.model` matches with the deleted id,
then on success the `client.auth_store` will be cleared.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.auth_response
documentation: Prepare successful collection authorization response.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.auth_with_password
documentation:
Authenticate a single auth collection record via its username/email and password.

On success, this method also automatically updates
the client's AuthStore data and returns:
- the authentication token
- the authenticated record model

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.auth_with_oauth2
documentation:
Authenticate a single auth collection record with OAuth2.

On success, this method also automatically updates
the client's AuthStore data and returns:
- the authentication token
- the authenticated record model
- the OAuth2 account data (eg. name, email, avatar, etc.)

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.authRefresh
documentation:
Refreshes the current authenticated record instance and
returns a new token and record data.

On success this method also automatically updates the client's AuthStore.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.requestEmailChange
documentation:
Asks to change email of the current authenticated record instance the new address
receives an email with a confirmation token that needs to be confirmed with confirmEmailChange()

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.confirmEmailChange
documentation: Confirms Email Change by with the confirmation token and confirm with users password

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.requestPasswordReset
documentation: Sends auth record password reset request.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.requestVerification
documentation: Sends email verification request.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.confirmPasswordReset
documentation: Confirms auth record password reset request

methods.name: pocketbase.services.record_service.RecordService.confirmVerification
documentation: Confirms email verification request.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.admin_service.AdminService.update
documentation:
If the current `client.auth_store.model` matches with the updated id,
then on success the `client.auth_store.model` will be updated with the result.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.admin_service.AdminService.delete
documentation:
If the current `client.auth_store.model` matches with the deleted id,
then on success the `client.auth_store` will be cleared.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.admin_service.AdminService.auth_response
documentation: Prepare successful authorize response.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.admin_service.AdminService.auth_with_password
documentation:
Authenticate an admin account with its email and password
and returns a new admin token and data.

On success this method automatically updates the client's AuthStore data.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.admin_service.AdminService.authRefresh
documentation:
Refreshes the current admin authenticated instance and
returns a new token and admin data.

On success this method automatically updates the client's AuthStore data.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.admin_service.AdminService.requestPasswordReset
documentation: Sends admin password reset request.

methods.name: pocketbase.services.admin_service.AdminService.confirmPasswordReset
documentation: Confirms admin password reset request.
